{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173438C8029E8F0623D5E1B78E"}"},"total":234},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7424929035430150974","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔真的很不错，剧情、场景的画面感、人物动作什么的都很不错，日常剧情很甜很美好。
但确实有几点我觉着有点美中不足的。首先就是基本上都是一大段一大段文字去排，这样看剧情就非常难受，需要仔细的去看，很容易让人产生疲倦感。
然后作为互换文，林洛作为188的直男从开始交往之后瞬间变成小娇妻的形态，而且也就交往几个月就和曾经的自己做，正常男生的话面对自己的身体去撒娇，亲亲，甚至去做，我觉得都需要蛮久的适应过程，好歹是20年的男生，除非性取向本来就不对。
从肌肉直男到在曾经的自己怀里撒娇，几个月的时间貌似有点快。
如果是因为获得了对方全部记忆之后原本性别的性格就完全抛弃了，那其实和换回来也差不了多少了。而且互换文的话，过早的完全抛弃原本性别的性格，其实就和普通恋爱小甜文差不多了。","text_exts":[{"e":124,"s":121,"text":"188","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=188&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773999278D5E1B78E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227424929035430150974%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227335677994507176984%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22188%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728755728,"group_id":"7335677994507176984","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无聊发给哈哈哈哈嗝哈哈哈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0mWIyeEUw0p+sbBgDoMXY+7F01adbF/sHrxo1zvLCx2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6b4f6ea85a7f4bef9e5f56861a908a56~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529514&x-signature=tjGtsJOrd8c2wh9s%2BiW%2BIHzSp6c%3D","user_id":"1776463016899783","user_name":"活在梦里的小鬼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1776463016899783","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7335677994507176984","book_info":{"abstract":"【互换灵魂、变嫁、脑洞、校园、无系统、言情甜美文】
一次意外林洛竟然变成学院最美的高冷富婆校花？？

两个人互换身体，互换人生，似乎一切都变的有意思了起来。

“哇，衣柜里全是漂亮裙子？”

“啊？衣柜里全是大裤衩子？”
